name: Almond Slices
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the sugar, all-purpose flour, brown sugar, eggs, baking powder, almond extract, and cinnamon (if using).
2. Gradually add the almonds and oil to the mixture, stirring until well combined.
3. Shape the dough into flattened logs on a greased baking sheet.
4. Brush the top of each log with beaten egg (separate from the recipe's beaten eggs if possible).
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 19-25 minutes, or until golden brown and firm to the touch.
6. Allow the almond slices to cool completely before cutting into wedges.
